meta.title: Yango Deli — Join Our Team
meta.description: Join Yango Deli team — pickers, couriers, customer service and shift managers. Apply and start working.

trust.label: On the team
trust.title: What Our People Value
trust.subtitle: Fresh groceries, fast delivery, and a team that shows up for each other — that's the Yango Deli standard.

hero.title: We're Looking for Pickers Like You
hero.subtitle: Join Yango Deli — Israel's fresh grocery & ready-to-eat delivery. Apply today and start picking orders at a branch near you.

mission.label: Why Yango Deli
mission.body: Yango Deli brings fresh groceries and ready-to-eat meals to customers' doors across Israel. As a picker, you're at the heart of every order — locating products, packing with care, and keeping deliveries on time in a fast-growing retail brand.

perks.title: Nationwide dark stores
perks.description: Branches across Israel — find one near home and start without a long commute.

perks.title: Smart picking app
perks.description: Locate products, check quality, and pack orders accurately — all guided on your phone.

perks.title: 30% employee discount
perks.description: Enjoy 30% off self-pickup products for breaks or end-of-day shopping.

perks.title: Fresh groceries & meals
perks.description: Pick produce, daily essentials, and ready-to-eat items for every Yango Deli order.

trust.label: Picker life
trust.subtitle: What pickers tell us they love about the job — beyond the paycheck.

points.title: Active, varied shifts
points.description: You're on your feet, moving through the store — not stuck behind a screen. Every order is a small mission.

points.title: Branches near home
points.description: Yango Deli operates nationwide. Find a dark store close to you and skip the long commute.

points.title: Team that has your back
points.description: Shift managers, trainers, and peers help you learn the floor fast — from day one.

points.title: Room to grow
points.description: Many pickers move up to shift lead, trainer, or operations roles inside Yango Deli.

points.title: Fresh groceries & meals
points.description: Pick produce, daily essentials, and ready-to-eat dishes — quality customers can taste.

points.title: Break rooms in every branch
points.description: Restrooms, seating, and kitchenettes so breaks feel human, not rushed.

benefits.label: Your day-to-day
benefits.title: What Awaits You
benefits.subtitle: Picking at Yango Deli is hands-on, structured, and built around real customer orders — not busywork.

items.title: Picking Orders
items.description: Use the in-store app to locate products, check quality, and pack orders accurately for couriers and customers.

items.title: Start Working Immediately
items.description: Morning and evening shifts on weekdays and weekends — choose what fits your schedule after a short onboarding.

items.title: Growth Opportunities
items.description: Training, feedback, and internal promotion paths — from picker to shift lead and beyond.

items.title: Quality checks
items.description: Verify expiry dates and product condition before every order leaves the branch.

items.title: Team rhythm
items.description: Work with pickers, shift leads, and couriers in one smooth order flow.

items.title: Stable scheduling
items.description: Morning, evening, and weekend slots you can plan around after onboarding.

whyJoin.label: Employee perks
whyJoin.title: Why Join Us?
whyJoin.subtitle: Perks designed like the Yango Deli app experience — clear, generous, and easy to use.

items.title: 30% Discount
items.description: Enjoy a 30% discount on a wide range of self-pickup products for breaks or end-of-day shopping.

items.title: Bonuses
items.description: Performance bonuses, referral bonuses and more to boost your earnings.

items.title: Career Growth
items.description: Internal promotion paths and personal training investment.

items.title: Refer a friend
items.description: Bring great people to Yango Deli and earn a referral bonus when they join.

howItWorks.label: Getting started
howItWorks.title: What We Have That Others Don't
howItWorks.subtitle: From online application to your first shift — a straightforward path, no endless waiting.

items.title: Nationwide Branches
items.description: Dark stores across Israel — pick a location close to home and start without a long commute.

items.title: Refreshment Rooms
items.description: Every branch includes restrooms, seating, and kitchenettes so breaks feel human, not rushed.

items.title: Quick Process
items.description: Apply online, meet us at the branch for a short interview, and get scheduled for your first shift.

items.title: 30% employee discount
items.description: Enjoy 30% off self-pickup products for breaks or end-of-day shopping.

items.title: Referral bonuses
items.description: Performance bonuses and bring-a-friend rewards that boost your monthly pay.

cta.title: Ready to Join?
cta.subtitle: Fill in the form — it takes about 2 minutes. We'll call you to schedule an interview at a Yango Deli branch near you.

hero.title: We're Looking for Couriers Like You
hero.subtitle: Deliver fresh groceries with Yango Deli — flexible shifts, fast payouts, and bonuses on every route.

mission.label: Why deliver with us
mission.body: Yango Deli couriers keep cities moving — from dark store to doorstep with fresh groceries and ready meals. You choose your vehicle, your hours, and how much you want to earn on every route.

perks.title: Your vehicle, your rules
perks.description: E-bike, scooter, or car — ride the way that fits your city and your schedule.

perks.title: Bi-weekly payouts
perks.description: Freelancer-friendly pay every two weeks — transparent earnings you can plan around.

perks.title: Bonuses on every route
perks.description: Weather, distance, peak-hour, and load bonuses stack on top of your base pay.

perks.title: Route app guidance
perks.description: Clear navigation, order details, and support chat built into the courier app.

trust.label: Courier life
trust.subtitle: Why riders stay with Yango Deli season after season.

points.title: Freedom on the road
points.description: No desk, no fixed office — you ride on your schedule with clear route guidance in the app.

points.title: Earnings that scale
points.description: More deliveries and peak-hour bonuses mean your income grows with your effort.

points.title: Real support
points.description: Managers and support reps answer questions about routes, orders, and payouts quickly.

points.title: Fast onboarding
points.description: Apply, complete a short briefing, set shifts — and start earning within days.

points.title: Yango Deli thermal bag
points.description: Keep groceries and ready meals at the right temperature on every delivery.

points.title: Peak-hour earnings
points.description: Lunch, dinner, and weekend rush bonuses when demand is highest.

benefits.label: On the road
benefits.title: What Awaits You
benefits.subtitle: Courier work built around flexibility — you decide the vehicle, the hours, and the pace.

items.title: Your Decision
items.description: E-Bike, Scooter, or Car — all are welcome

items.title: Earn More Monthly
items.description: Simple math: more deliveries = more earnings

items.title: Choose Your Shifts
items.description: Days and hours are yours to choose with no weekly minimum.

items.title: Route support
items.description: In-app navigation plus managers and support reps one message away.

items.title: Thermal equipment
items.description: Yango Deli bags and gear so orders arrive fresh at the doorstep.

items.title: No weekly minimum
items.description: Choose shifts that fit your life — days and hours are yours to decide.

whyJoin.label: Courier perks
whyJoin.title: Why Join Us? Here's Why
whyJoin.subtitle: Competitive pay plus the extras that make every delivery worth it.

items.title: Get Paid Fast
items.description: Freelancers receive bi-weekly payouts directly — transparent and predictable.

items.title: Plus, Bonuses
items.description: Holiday, weather, distance, and load bonuses stack on top of your base earnings.

items.title: 30% Discount
items.description: Enjoy 30% off self-pickup products — perfect for breaks or end-of-day shopping.

items.title: Referral bonus
items.description: Know a great rider? Refer them to Yango Deli and earn when they start.

howItWorks.label: Start earning
howItWorks.title: What Sets Us Apart
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from application to your first paid delivery.

items.title: No Traffic Hassle
items.description: Pick shifts that avoid rush hour — ride when the city works for you, not against you.

items.title: Always Supported
items.description: Managers and support reps are one message away for routes, orders, or account questions.

items.title: Fast Onboarding
items.description: Apply online, complete a short briefing, choose shifts, and hit the road.

items.title: Vehicle registration
items.description: Register your e-bike, scooter, or car and get approved within days.

items.title: First shift support
items.description: Briefing, bag pickup, and a support line for your first routes on the road.

cta.title: Ready to Hit the Road?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about yourself and your vehicle — we'll reach out to complete registration and schedule your first shifts.

hero.title: If Service Runs in Your Blood, We're Looking for You
hero.subtitle: Join Yango Deli customer service — help shoppers, couriers, and stores via chat and phone, often from home.

mission.label: Service at Yango Deli
mission.body: Our support team is the voice of Yango Deli — solving real issues for shoppers, couriers, and branch staff with empathy, speed, and clear communication in a young, growing company.

perks.title: Work from home
perks.description: Handle chats and calls from a quiet home setup — minimum 3 shifts per week on your schedule.

perks.title: Three languages, one team
perks.description: Support customers in Hebrew, English, or Russian — whichever you speak best.

perks.title: Training before live cases
perks.description: Structured onboarding, knowledge base, and team leads coach you before the first ticket.

perks.title: Knowledge base & tools
perks.description: Product guides, policies, and CRM tools so you answer with confidence.

trust.label: Support team
trust.subtitle: What our customer service agents value most.

points.title: Meaningful conversations
points.description: You solve real problems — late orders, product questions, courier support — not scripted upselling.

points.title: Flexible remote work
points.description: Many shifts run from home with a minimum of 3 shifts per week that you choose.

points.title: Training & tools
points.description: Full onboarding, knowledge base, and team leads before you handle live customers.

points.title: Bonuses that matter
points.description: Performance bonuses on top of salary — quality and speed are both rewarded.

points.title: Hebrew, English & Russian
points.description: Serve customers in the language you know best — all three are welcome.

points.title: Career inside Yango
points.description: Team leads started as agents — clear paths to coaching and management roles.

benefits.label: Your role
benefits.title: What Awaits You
benefits.subtitle: Customer service at Yango Deli means real-time help for real people — shoppers, riders, and store teams.

items.title: Young & Dynamic Team
items.description: Work with a quality team, ages 18+

items.title: Flexible Shifts
items.description: Morning/evening shifts on weekdays and weekends

items.title: Top-Notch Customer Service
items.description: Support customers, couriers and stores via chat and calls

items.title: Chat & phone channels
items.description: Help shoppers, couriers, and branch teams through modern support tools.

items.title: Coaching on every shift
items.description: Team leads review cases with you and help you grow your service skills.

items.title: Performance bonuses
items.description: Quality and availability rewards that meaningfully boost monthly pay.

whyJoin.label: Team perks
whyJoin.title: Why Join Us?
whyJoin.subtitle: Benefits that match a modern remote-first service team.

items.title: Work from Home
items.description: Skip the commute — handle chats and calls from a quiet home setup with company tools.

items.title: Rewarding Bonuses
items.description: Quality and availability bonuses that meaningfully boost your monthly pay.

items.title: Flexible Work
items.description: Minimum 3 shifts per week on mornings, evenings, or weekends — you build the schedule.

items.title: Young team culture
items.description: Work with a dynamic team ages 18+ in a fast-growing Israeli retail brand.

howItWorks.label: Join the team
howItWorks.title: What Sets Us Apart
howItWorks.subtitle: From application to your first live chat — with training at every step.

items.title: Professional Training
items.description: Structured onboarding covering products, policies, and tools before live cases.

items.title: Supportive Team
items.description: Team leads and managers available on every shift for coaching and escalations.

items.title: Quick Process
items.description: Apply online, interview remotely, and start within days after training.

items.title: Remote interview
items.description: Apply online and interview from home — no branch commute required.

items.title: Shadow shifts
items.description: Listen to live cases with a team lead before you take your first ticket solo.

cta.title: Ready to Join?
cta.subtitle: Submit your details — we'll contact you for a remote interview and training schedule.

hero.title: Experienced in Customer Service? Time for Your Next Step
hero.subtitle: Lead Yango Deli shift teams — coach pickers, own the floor, and grow into senior operations roles.

mission.label: Lead at Yango Deli
mission.body: Shift managers run the heartbeat of every Yango Deli branch — quality, speed, team morale, and customer satisfaction during live order peaks across Israel's fastest-growing grocery network.

perks.title: Own the shift floor
perks.description: Lead pickers and floor staff during rush hours — staffing, quality checks, and customer issues.

perks.title: Hybrid flexibility
perks.description: Blend branch floor time with remote planning and reporting — not 100% desk or 100% floor.

perks.title: Path to senior ops
perks.description: Competitive salary plus a direct line to regional operations leadership for career growth.

perks.title: Live operations dashboard
perks.description: Track order peaks, staffing, and quality metrics in real time during every shift.

trust.label: Shift leadership
trust.subtitle: What experienced managers appreciate about Yango Deli.

points.title: Real ownership
points.description: You run the shift — staffing, quality checks, and customer issues — with authority and support.

points.title: Hybrid flexibility
points.description: Blend branch floor time with remote planning and reporting — not 100% desk or 100% floor.

points.title: Competitive pay
points.description: Management salary plus performance and engagement bonuses tied to team results.

points.title: Growth path
points.description: Internal promotions to senior shift lead, trainer, and regional operations roles.

points.title: Coach your team
points.description: Train pickers, set the floor standard, and build a shift culture people want to join.

points.title: Regional mentorship
points.description: Operations leaders invest in your management skills with regular feedback.

benefits.label: Your leadership
benefits.title: What Awaits You
benefits.subtitle: Shift management at Yango Deli is hands-on leadership with modern tools and real career progression.

items.title: Team Leadership
items.description: Lead a professional customer service team

items.title: Hybrid Role
items.description: Mix of remote and office work

items.title: Professional Management
items.description: Ongoing guidance from leadership

items.title: Staffing & quality
items.description: Own picker schedules, quality checks, and customer issue resolution each shift.

items.title: Operations reporting
items.description: Blend floor leadership with remote planning and shift performance reviews.

items.title: Training budget
items.description: Company investment in your leadership development and branch certifications.

whyJoin.label: Management perks
whyJoin.title: Why Join Us?
whyJoin.subtitle: Compensation and benefits that reflect the responsibility you take on every shift.

items.title: Excellent Salary
items.description: Competitive base pay for shift managers — aligned with retail operations leadership in Israel.

items.title: Rewarding Bonuses
items.description: Performance, quality, and team engagement bonuses each month.

items.title: Great Benefits
items.description: Employee discount, training budget, and full employee benefits package.

items.title: Internal promotions
items.description: Move up to senior shift lead, trainer, or regional operations inside Yango Deli.

howItWorks.label: Your path in
howItWorks.title: What Sets Us Apart
howItWorks.subtitle: We hire managers who've done service — and give them room to lead.

items.title: Career Path
items.description: Clear progression to senior shift lead, trainer, and regional operations inside Yango Deli.

items.title: Expert Team
items.description: Work alongside experienced operations leaders who invest in your management skills.

items.title: Quick Process
items.description: Apply, interview with operations, and onboard with shadow shifts at your assigned branch.

items.title: Shadow at your branch
items.description: Onboard with experienced managers before you run your first solo shift.

items.title: Operations interview
items.description: Meet regional leadership, align on expectations, and pick your home branch.

cta.title: Ready for the Next Step?
cta.subtitle: Share your service experience — we'll schedule a management interview at a branch or remotely.
